infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Flare uses your camera to add photos to your flights.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Flare accesses your photos to add images to your flights and profile.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Flair tracks how long you spend at the airport so you don't have to log it manually.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Flair tracks how long you spend at the airport, even when the app is in the background.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Flair tracks how long you spend at the airport so you don't have to log it manually.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Flair tracks how long you spend at the airport, even when the app is in the background.
